_comment: Seed golden fixture. Unsurveyed upland vicinity case (mountain). Area stays at 0.0225 per the small-area rounding rule (docs/rules.md): rounding to 2 decimals would misstate a tiny tenure by 11%.
source_description: All that tract of land in the vicinity of South Forge Mountain, Kamloops Division of Yale District and containing 0.0225 hectares, more or less
expected_description: That parcel or tract of unsurveyed Crown land in the vicinity of South Forge Mountain, Kamloops Division Yale District, containing 0.0225 hectares, more or less.
